title: Execute Meshtastic iOS app smoke test
description: Run docs/meshtastic-smoke-test.md with a BLE-capable LICHEN target and an iPhone/iPad running the Meshtastic app. Collect discovery, connect, config sync, node DB sync, text send/receive, status, disconnect cleanup, ATT/MTU, screenshots/client logs, and firmware serial evidence.
acceptance_criteria: iOS evidence attached to Beads notes: mandatory no-hardware Twister preflight and Python vector/prototype drift checks passed; firmware commit/build and target board recorded; iOS app version and phone OS/device recorded; BLE service/characteristic discovery includes acknowledged ToRadio write and FromNum read/write/notify; sync stages 69420/69421 and FromNum/FromRadio drain pass; post-sync ADMIN_APP get_owner_request/session-passkey behavior returns supported responses, otherwise record only partial read-only smoke and block full pass on project-LICHEN-t2hn.23 or child; raw ATT evidence proves 504-byte ToRadio write and 510-byte FromRadio read succeed, otherwise the smoke is blocked for that board/phone/stack; text send reaches the LICHEN local message submit contract, otherwise the text-send checkpoint fails and blocks on project-LICHEN-t2hn.7.2 or child; incoming text/status behavior and disconnect cleanup pass; unsupported-operation safety checks do not mutate native LICHEN state; evidence confirms this is a local app surface and not Meshtastic RF interoperability; failure triage recorded for any mismatch.
notes: Blocked for this no-hardware session: requires a BLE-capable flashed LICHEN target, iOS device with Meshtastic app, phone-side BLE/scanner/client-log evidence, and physical connection/disconnect/ATT observations. The reusable procedure is docs/meshtastic-smoke-test.md.
